# mtncloud_key_pair (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud SSH key pair by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_key_pair" "deploy" {
  name = "deploy"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the key pair to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the key pair.
- `public_key` (String) The public key material.
